title: Answer a relationship question safely
goal: Determine which company Jane belongs to without guessing schema details first.
assumptions: Agents will use ls/describe/find before making assumptions about collections and fields.
Stable JSON output is enough for the model to follow the result shape.
prompt: You are connected to an unfamiliar backend. Find which company Jane belongs to. Do not mutate anything.
success_checks: At least one discovery command used before the final answer
failure_modes: Answers without checking the live schema
